title: ChestNet
description: ChestNet helps you quickly find items stored in nearby chests and containers. Search for an item, highlight the matching containers, and see the exact slots where the item is located.
body:
ChestNet is a client-side Minecraft mod that helps you find items inside nearby chests and containers without opening every one by hand.

![i](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73bef8f522bfe2f2f1127e4d61ad60cc7f6ed0ec.png)

Have you ever lost an item somewhere in your storage room?  
With ChestNet, you can search for an item, and the mod will highlight containers where that item was previously found. When you open a matching container, ChestNet can also highlight the exact slot where the item is located.

## Features

- Search for items stored in nearby chests and containers
- Highlight containers that may contain the selected item
- Highlight exact matching slots inside opened containers
- Search by typing an item name
- Search for the item under your mouse cursor with a hotkey
- Save container data separately for each world or server
- Fully client-side — no server installation required

## How it works

ChestNet does not magically scan every chest in the world.  
It remembers container contents when you open them and saves this data locally. Because of this, each world or server has its own separate database.

The more you use ChestNet in your storage area, the more useful it becomes.
